### prAna303 — 2014-08-03T10:47:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-136596>

Today we have built a system based upon what we are teached from early years and into our death.

I have never felt at home in those guidelines, it does not matter if it is work, living, social skills or how we have relationships with other humans and other living things.

From early years i been more wild than tamed, grown up without fingers pointing at me saying what to do or how to behave, my friends from school had many rules....

All of this also made me question the normal family very early... When others got their first girlfriend i already had been with a few. The thing is that they are always big parts of my life but never the reason for my living. They have no restrictions from me at all and can come and go just like a cat would. Family for me is to have special loved ones around me but also at great distance, family for me is to have a connection to nature, to the sea, the mountain and the woods. Todays world is so focused on systems and i hate them...

For me love is life and in that soup i blend in, girls, trees, sea, sun, music, dance, art, movies and books... Top it of with some good wine, some great rum or simply a glass of natural wild water.

Even if i lived in one single spot my whole life i travel a lot... My nature gives me my journeys without planes, trains or automobiles. I love girls, although not one for a very long time... They come and go just like the harvest in the late summers do, some years great others not so.

Up till this day i have not found that woman who would change my mind, therefor i do not search for her. I want to taste the life no matter what, for good or bad. So i date quite a few, i flirt with many more... It is very simple because i do not have the final destination in my head when i meet some nice ones, just want the magic of the moment.

### Inger — 2014-08-03T10:54:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-136597>

Interesting.... i still wonder tho. My mind always have way too many questions

### caroline — 2014-08-03T11:46:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-136600>

I have known a few men in my lifetime who thought like Peter ...they love many women ...and all women.

I loved to watch them ...they knew what they needed and wanted out of life. It really wasn't superficial at all. they loved and then moved on. It was always interesting to me to see the women that thought they could tame them - they would be positive that they were the one ...and they never were.

It is impossible to tame an animal that must roam free .....you can try but it very likely isn't going to end well.

As Peter also said ... they almost always remained good friends and came and went out of one another's lives.

It is knowing who you are and what you want out of your life .... what you are willing to give ..... and when it is over and when to move on to another chapter of your own magnificent journey...

I think it is rare to truly know what we want and look forward ...instead of in our rearview mirror.

Jack has said some people think he is nuts - and he is okay with that .....

we all need to live our own life.....no regrets, no compromises ....

### Inger — 2014-08-03T16:42:14+0300

So true.
So much to learn

### prAna303 — 2014-08-04T20:47:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-136726>

Your reality.

What do you base your reality upon?

Have we come so far now that almost everyone base their thought, action and being on static information. The world we live in is built upon products today, not much natural is part of modern human now...

When we do live like this, everything around us is dying in terms of energy... What once was water is now dehydrated into bricks and oils from deep within is turned into plastics... The material from the elements, turned into simulations of real world, also known as technology. Everything is in a locked position, not resonating with other parts anymore, we are trapped in the labyrinth of human greatness.

If we have a world like this, time is golden... Timing on the other hand is lost. You mesure everything against things that is in a thermodynamic, entropy maximum. What have we become?

We have for many years based every little theory on so many dead measure points, called those who walk on the other side many names. Have we been following the wrong rules and laws? Why do we accept great innovators from a gone by era? Are we so scared to question them like many others done before with their masters that we accept being pushed like cattle in a modern farm.

So, a reality based on dead things makes humans... Dead, we equal the thing we see and base our life upon.

I, personally seek nature more for each day... Here nothing is static, here no place is messy, here every bit of information from the sun, the ground, the wind and water is giving me challenges. This is where i want to loose the static clock, the global sync and technology from hell, our manmade world.

### Jack Kruse — 2014-08-05T01:59:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-136768>

The road to success is never an individual battle but a collective effort. So who you hang out with and allow to help mold your thoughts will help craft your version of reality. So choose your confidants wisely. I don't claim to have all the answers but I do think I look under more rocks than most. The real oxymoron of life is we always seek to find the enemy in our health when in reality, the enemy is really us allowing other's craft the environment we live in.

### Jack Kruse — 2014-08-05T02:01:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-136769>

Our observed reality of our world should be enough to get us to change.......but as you have seen on this site.........it often is not enough.

### Jack Kruse — 2014-08-05T02:14:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-136779>

What has life fundamentally taught me? For me, it was what I can do to my life. Do I accept life as what is? Or do I reject my current life and recreate what can be? This year taught me circumstances may be beyond my control, but how I respond to them is a recreative force in me. The situation is not my boss, I am. If I want something new, I had to stop doing something old. Just changing your ideas about what is, is how creative destruction begins to transform what you will become.

### Shijin13 — 2014-08-26T22:19:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-138965>

So today a friend of mine posted the following on facebook

_"In 2014, I only know two people who have held out and stubbornly refuse to get even a basic call & text cell phone.

These people are like rare, exotic birds in our decade.

So I've made a point to ask these curious creatures how and why they continue to live without this seemingly essential ubiquitous little modern basic.

In that time, they have managed to pay their bills, maintain proper communication with their employers and their families, make appointments, tell time, calculate tips, and keep tidy a calendar.

Oh, and they have survived a heart attack and being hit by a car, respectively.

They both swear that in the last 15 years or so, neither of them has once encountered a situation they could not manage without a cell phone.

One of them put it best when he told me, "It's very simple. Any time a cell phone has ever been even remotely useful to me, from standing on the side of the road with a flat tire to getting directions, someone else has one to offer me. And any time those people every really, REALLY need them, it's out of battery power or they have no bars."

Touche.

But why? Why not just bite the bullet and move forward into the 21st century?

Well, here's some of the best reasons I've heard from them.

1\. " I used to be a smoker. I'm telling you, cell phones are the same thing. They have an obsessive, controlling effect on the user that requires him to 'check out of life' in order to attend his addiction."

2\. "It's expensive. Eleven hundred dollars a year? I could fly to Brazil for that. You think I'm going to give up a trip to Brazil for a phone?" Good point. I like that one.

3\. "I have the internet at home. I don't want it anywhere else. At some point, you just become whoever you are on Twitter."

4\. "Have you ever seen a family go out for a meal and spend the entire time looking at their phones? Like all of them? Or shading their screens from the sun on a beautiful day? Yeah. No thanks."

These two people have never been cell phone users. But it made me think about what would happen if the average cell phone user tried to "quit." How hard would it be? Have you even thought about what you would have to change? What you would do with all that extra time? How much more would connect to the people around you, notice where you are right now? What would you do with the extra cash? Buy a saxophone? Take tango lessons? Run a half marathon?

I think I'm going to start a movement."_

Pretty profound. Her observations hit home. really? do you need this stuff? if I look at nature the answer is no.

### nicld — 2014-08-26T22:39:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-138967>

^^^^^ Very, very good. I am trying to reduce my computer time at home greatly and the cell phone is never on at home. Now to just leave it in the car at work.

### Shijin13 — 2014-08-27T19:09:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-139055>

I've really started thinking about if I need the stuff we've got. the answer is no. no I do not. my challenge is how do I disconnect in this connected world, where my current job hinges upon this technology as a necessity. One thing I have done is I've started to ignore my phone. I don't bring it to meeting. I also don't bring my computer, unless I'm presenting. I use a straight up old fashioned pen and paper.... (GASP!) guess what I'm more focused. more attentive etc... limiting and ditching technology works...

### caroline — 2014-08-28T05:06:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-139108>

When we moved to Australia 7 years ago ..... we sent everything we owned by a slow boat. We wanted to be in a position to take our time to find a new home - with out any pressure.

We found a place the second day we were here.....and lived without all our "stuff" for four months.

We bought a bed, a TV, and a patio set and 2 plates etc. - funny how we needed the TV .... now I know better!

It was so amazing to feel so uncluttered and unencumbered by stuff ...it was very liberating!

We think we can't live without all our "stuff" .... but we absolutely can! really live - that is!

You soon see what is really important....... It is the people in our life ....and nothing else comes close.

### prAna303 — 2014-09-04T16:07:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-139908>

Illusions.

Each day we are fed with words like health and illness but are these words nothing more than just words?

Health is somekind of measure points that is made by static information. We have small details that we check to see how we face the world today, the same goes with illness...

But if we would let go of these norms in a simple mindgame, what is left over? For sure some different levels of life but also we start to see magic in the shadows. The one thing that makes me feel good makes you suffer, the illness here is good just around the corner. You shift from heaven to hell in just a second, who has not felt that in connection with people? This is why regular rules do not apply to everyone...

We must have both of these so called words because they are the same but what makes the difference? Energy... When the things that are natural becomes a trouble we should not hide from it, we should accept that we must load and transfer that golden parts that is energy, then memories can work again.

Deja Vu.

Is those two words what allergy is but as a condition we are missing the big part that makes sense, once again energy. If you have been told over and over again that you are ill can you see clearly? If you shut down every little sensory system, how can healing be done? When and if you transfer energy you see that the methods for your treatment is weird and you can leave it behind...

Why can a spider be so scary? The memory that is inside of you tells you that this one you can been around before, yes some can be deadly therefor you must react... If you are so energy depleted as many are today, this little thing makes you scared like hell, if you are loaded, you react with normal senses and just avoid it. The same goes on and on with most aspects of nature today, people get scared and think they are going to die if the get lost or just go camping.

Just because we have rules of how we should live does not mean that they are in sync with living. The illness we all have to some degree is vital for us, how we react is the modern error and that comes down to the simple fact of energy.

### prAna303 — 2014-09-04T20:05:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-139927>

The strange adventure in music.

What will happen when you apply music to your water? And how do you react?

Also known as analog versus digital world of tunes. During this summer i come to the conclusion that music once again is bigger than me, way bigger. But like my rants before i must choose analog ways of enjoying it, digital do not make me go crazy in a good way. I have always had a sweet tooth for audiophile soundsystems but it ended for some time, i think it began 1992...

I talked with one of my audio friends a couple of days ago, he had some courses with a man who is fighting for good sound... They talked about how bad sound is today and why, i buy it all but i must add another level to it, the quantum one. In those years, say 1992, the CD took over slowly but that is just one level. The recording studios stopped using those high end stuff because the craved energy big time, they went digital also. Which brings me to my experiment this summer... To feed on music.

When i use a cd i can get some emotions, when i listen to streaming music it feels dead... There is no dynamics left, it is flat as a pancake, and we know that wheat do no good today. The major effect other than the room that is painted in the analog way of presenting music is how my eyes work. When i digest music, dark room, closed eyes but with my mouth quite open, loud and kicking i get some deep resonance in my mouth that turns of the lights inside me. I get in five minutes so warm i can almost not sit still but my eyes... I cry but without feelings, or the feelings is there in all levels so i enjoy everything but my eyes is so refreshed after a session. This may be just me because i have done some real damage to them before, is it a healing? Who knows.

The same thing when i use an instrument, is this why we always enjoyed music but never had words for the meaning?

Again i must choose analog because everyone else is going the other way. The same with water, we can not fake it.

Irony of it all? Water will soon be so expensive that few can afford it i think, just like high end soundsystems. The real things in this world is becoming the most delicate but who buys?

### prAna303 — 2014-09-04T20:30:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-139928>

> [Shijin13 said:](/goto/post?id=139846)

>
> what grabbed me was this:
> "Then I heard a distant rumble.
>
> The river. Out of sight, down in the valley.
>
> “Sounds like a highway,” I said.
>
> Darin’s reply was casual but profound.
>
> “Highways sound like rivers.”

Yes, for many this is their reality...

What will happen with a world of humans who live lifes thru technology? If you look at all the flowers in the world with an application, will the ones who are natural appear bad. In real world nothing is static like the digital realm is, it smells, it is dirty it is raw and naked but it makes us function, why?

We remember! But would not an image do the same? To some level but what is living things made of, energy in different phases which are shifting. Just like summer goes into fall and everything breaks down to once again awake when the sun is in its right position. This is also why timing is more important than time.

I just look around my own town, everyone is talking about the summer that ended just like this, and it is just the end of august. But i do not feel the same, it is the season that it is. When change comes i dig deep into the woods for signals instead of worrying about what time it is, this is why time is an illusion.

When i hear people talk today, when i hear the politicians hymn i feel like...

But then again, i must dig deeper.

Why is this going on more than ever, the more i think about it the wider the gap grows between us and nature.

It is simple i think, because we have lost the powers of being the famous demon. The energy crisis is now so big that most people live in a world of less details. I belive we are based on the system of LIFO, last in first out... Anyone who done business knows this, LIFO vs FIFO. This means and i see it everytime i meet my so called clients, they have lost it. The small details that would make them sublime is nowhere to find, what makes us sublime? The ability to get, transfer and dump energy in a good fashion. When we do not meet the needs for energy we must shut down what we designed last in our evolution... Senses like touch smell and vision. The ability to respond to stress and soon we become walking dead, just longing for energy... Hello addiction.

To see what is bad, to make choices that will rise your life above illness you need what i said above.

A dying breed.

[http://www.epictv.com/media/podcast...ber-|-cedar-wright-climbing-reels-ep-5/277505](http://www.epictv.com/media/podcast/this-guy-is-the-last-of-a-dying-breed-of-climber-%7C-cedar-wright-climbing-reels-ep-5/277505)

The connection between humans and the environment, not just the goofball connection but the ones that count. Everywhere i look i see simulations but also small groups of people who is dedicated, driven to not accept the framework we live in today...

Some move away from the modern world and make a brand new thing out of it... We can use technology and at the same time reconnect, i promise you that, it will not mean that we cut every string one by one. Ask yourself, what is your life meaning to you and the ones you share it with... Working like hell and feeling like shit do no good for your kids because it makes damages to yourself in first hand. Added with science we can rewrite what must be done, many trails lead to wrong destinations. Who stops you to become a scientist? Schools mosty make diplomas today...

Even if you do not understand my language Swedish, just look at the pictures and the story will rise inside yourself. Just someone young who decided to move to a better place...

[http://jonnajinton.se/](http://jonnajinton.se/)

And with that i just want to say, we all can be the quirky and weird things that physics talk about, just look beyond what the norm says, otherwise we are a dying breed.

-   If we're ever going to get the [world](http://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/World) back on a [natural](http://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/Natural) footing, back in tune with natural rhythyms, if we're going to nurture the[Earth](http://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/Earth) and protect it and have fun with it and learn from it — which is what [mothers](http://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/Mothers) do with their [children](http://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/Children) — then we've got to put [technology](http://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/Technology) (an aggressive masculine system) in its proper place, which is that of a tool to be used sparingly, joyfully, gently and only in the fullest cooperation with nature. **Nature must govern technology, not the other way around.**

Tom Robbins - Even cowgirls get the blues (1976)

### Jack Kruse — 2014-09-25T02:37:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-141848>

I got into the biohacking business by mistake ten years ago. I got ill for the first time in my life. After researching my issue I learned from my bio hacks three things. My understanding of medicine was too narrow and superficial, the environment dictates how genes are expressed, and that no one really has a clue how mitochondrial really work.

This is why modern diseases have seemingly appeared from no where.

No one really understands the scale that we fundamentally work at.

My injury provided me an idea. An idea that I might be able to fix me. I realized an idea is worthless without action. Ideation without execution leads to deletion of any good idea.

**Reflection turns experience to insight.**

Just because I got older and more experienced in my specialty did not mean I got more wise. Out of reflection we create to waves of knowledge.

When we reflect inward, we think, analyze and conclude.

Every life hack I have done has shown me that light & magnetism are the key that starts/stops the engine in us using circadian biology.

Water is life’s battery

Food & hormones are proxies for the substrate of the current of life

Cold Thermogenesis is a synonym for magnetism which acts like the integrated circuit that organizes that current

DHA captures that current and sends it to every square millimeter of our body using collagen.

The brain is the navigator that derives the environmental electromagnetic spectrum to allow our mitochondrial DNA speak to our nuclear DNA using a language both understand.

Optimal requires all systems working in concert, if one is off the entire system doesn’t work properly or efficiently.

I'm ready..............are you?

### prAna303 — 2014-10-01T09:19:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-142383>

Unique.

In search for a bigger great many of us have given up ourselves. We get teached early on in life that we should build a good society and be a good member of it, have we gone to far?

Common sense is today what drives everything, leaders that form in these groups play the deck of cards this way. One apply to many, what we need is the comfort of big herds because one to one, who can afford the time to invest?

We get told stories, to get scared many times... Almost everyone in my town is scared these days, why i must ask. Deep down inside of us we feel a mismatch but then again, who do we listen to, who do we go to for help, often the big common sense.

Now we have a world that is on one side, angry, crazy and stacking guns. On the other? Soft cotton balls and faked hugs on facebook. To navigate thru life we need it all, the dirt, the elements, up and down, if we escape that part of life i belive we build these above sides, it is a mismatch once again. Look into the arts, or what once was it, perfect signs there every day.

Technology is faking it! Sorry, to decorate your blog and facebook page, do not make you unique... You forgot that you are a living you but we are letting it go. If life gets to scary, dig deep into gadget and fake society, here you will not have the pain from a poor fellow, asking you for a dime. Just shut down what is dirty and demanding your real passion.

Common sense is that we should do what leaders and fake leaders want you to do, it is easier to manage the ones who given up. Who are the leaders? All of us today meet them, they can be friends, doctors, leaders in politics and the big companies that paint a picture of happiness and joy...

Unique, we are and should be. This is why, the life i live is not for you to copy. I can not copy any others either, i must find every detail that makes me, yes me, fall into place and meaning. This is why so many feel that i am weird... I do not claim a world where everyone is, exactly one, lonely. I fight for unique living things that deserve unique connection. I have dug into many different things thru life, taking big gulps of vintage wine but also got drunk on bad booze. Getting lost in towns and finding home in the woods, going from rich to poor, i did it all, why? Comfort and warmth makes me itch.

This is also why i stopped watching TV, stopped reading newspapers, really stopped listening to society in big... We get feeded one solution to many. I find so many more clues to life thru science, old writers, outcasts, climbers, dogs and cats and the beauty of details. Just because the weather report said rain, the reality gives me sunshine, and who is the winner? Me, hanging loose or those scared inside hunching, pressing reload, hoping for sun.

### caroline — 2014-10-01T12:36:28+0300

### Inger — 2014-10-01T15:27:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-142405>

True words Peter ^^^

Almost everyone is scared......

The place / home i work at as a maid - they are both doctors... vets. It is so funny.... that they want me as their maid because I am living a totally opposite life....

The mother is so scared of bacteria... and dirt... and she believes everything CW tells us...... she told me it is really dangerous to eat raw eggs...... err.....
but still.... even if I have told openly about how I live and eat... (I never criticize anything she says or does tho... I know better than that) they have not fired me yet. I do try my very best to do everything like my boss want, even if I find it a little exaggerated.. lol but it is just my work and I will do anything she says, of course.

So... a very magic ting happened the other day.. as I stood in the kitchen... and she had to take care of some sick animal and could not come for cooking so I started to cook lunch with their boy.. and the dad tried to help but he was so stressed and said he cannot cook at all.... but he was so sweet.. lol he said.. oh cooking is stressing! I think he is the most stressed man I have seen in my life... he works every day 7 days / week... he always works. but he is very kind too.. and he smiles all the time when he looks at me.... so there we were... all tree in the kitchen.. and I thought it was so fun to cook with the 10 yo guy... i was not stressed at all.. and right there... I all of a sudden felt something very magic... it sure was quantum!
I felt, like... I gave him. the father and doc, time....??? It was so weird! It was like he was a vacuum.. and I have so much time.. and he kind of sucked it up.... he sucked my time up.. and it made him smile........ it was like I gave them all time... Am I going crazy? It had nothing to do with what we were doing.... it was just so out of this world feeling.. so good. But it was so real... and I had to think about it all the way home in my car....... it was a very quantum feeling I can tell.
I do not have much to give....... but I have time.... i am pretty confused in my head... damaged and whatnot.. but one thing I can do well lately.... it seems. I can be present. I am very present when I am with people... it just happens - I am just interested in them. People interests me. Maybe because I am so much alone? And this presence is kind of.. time. it feels like that.

I am pretty fearless.. and i have time too... seems like something people gets attracted to because it is lacking in today's world?

Today I drove their daughter to ride her horse.. and we talked in the car... 15 yo girl. she is always so cold she told me. I told her what she could do... we had a nice chat... she always seemed so shy.. but she really lightened up in the car and listened to me.. and she talked too... I really loved it. It made me happy too

The weird thing is.. they make me happy. It does not matter at all that we are so different....

they give me
and I give them....

I am so in love with life - the black and the white and the dark and the light and all the colors in between
just WOW

### prAna303 — 2014-10-04T22:18:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-142820>

With you back facing forward.

If you think that only looking at things that happened before, adding on things that worked before, is going to make your future look bright, think again. We have eyes and sensors that do not only see but we make a meaning out of it with our brains, we can somehow navigate with our senses, this we are loosing today. Why do we have this passion, looking with romantic eyes on the past instead of having a vivid thought about future?

Instead, search what is coming in trends and adjust with your best senses, not common sense. I think we must accept that everything is changing even if we want it to be a standard, a norm that would apply to everything. This is why i think politics are way out of order now, this one to many, not working...

When you always look back, you with great powers block your potential. Stop it, get over it but do not forget it, have it with you when you go out and start living again. Do not sit home alone, even if your dear one is with you, sitting by this gadget computer, looking at tv or having a fight about your next car, life is bigger and at the same time smaller.

The smallest thing can change your mood, your feelings and your life in just... Snap of a finger. Why? It is not about the amount, the volume, it is about the smallest details... How come? How much do we really get? Think about bandwith and how much we take in and how much we really make take notice to. If just a small pill can kill pain, how about real energy?

Take your unit you. Lift it up and go out, nature is great but we also have done great things even if we done bad ones. Find your local scene of arts, go into the mix of people, see music live, see dance and get drawn into other dimensions, it is about energy and activation... For sure, youtube can give you some but not the real hardcore fix we need. Spotify can give you tunes but, hey, feeling a full range hifi system pushing bass thru your bones, what a kick.

Today, we all, almost all have reached a level in quality in life that is fake, simulation. We made us lazy, mostly because we think we need this or that, we need insurance and comfort, big money sells stuff to us with fear in their preaching, just like many priest have done before. The price we pay is this modern illness and it does not only apply to EMF and gadgets, everything is this pleasure dome of hell now.

Okey, tie this bag up... Start living even if you are ill, start living even if your are heartbroken, start living even if others say not. Energy comes in many shapes and must be converted, food, sun, water, earth, smells, music, human touch, animal touch and so many more. We must find our new golden age for ourselves and invite others but we must in first hand do it LIVE!

Yes, Inger, cooking dinner for them was quantum. You were transferring energy, something we were made to do. By transferring energy to others, you made them happy and yourself happy. I think you are teaching them, by example, how much better their existence can be. The mother may be rejecting what you say, but it is making an impact, I'm certain.

### prAna303 — 2014-10-18T19:57:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-144198>

Twisting and turning.

Many think i train, many talks about training, so many words to describe a mismatch made up.

I can not describe what i do with my life, details i can make words tell but the big picture, not. When i get in groups with others they always come up with questions on why, how, that is bad and the list goes on. As of today, this applies to every level of my own life, my own unit called me, but...

On the case of training, i do not. Why do i say this to all my friends? Simply because for me, the things i do is living. The living i do, i make it and play it out loud. Often, just like earlier on today everyone asks how they should train and all i can say is do not.

Okey, with their perspective i do as much training as the pros do. That is when you measure it with todays watches, this is one mistake i think. To break it down, i often get out and run (modern word) for hours (modern technology). For me, time do not work in nature like that, i play along with the elements. At the same time i loose things and gain far greater, because we do not function like your friends car or house... When i run i play a basic game inside of me, just like the modern simulation (computer games) i move myself thru different levels, up and down, left and right, forward but also stepping back to watch my obstacles, then choose new paths. For me, running is chess in the wild.

I climb, to touch the granite where i can dance on rocks.

I freedive, enter the realm that made me, letting it go in, out and thru my body.

I look at the nature, many do not. I smell the leaves that is getting rotten, i flip the switch that welcomes winter.

We have a weird passion for measuring things, life also. We search for greater specs instead of letting the story be told so we can act freely. We are made up of the most basic things in the world, that world is the universe. We are all stars going thru the same stages as the ones that light up the sky, we change all our materials inside of us, like a sun burns thru all of its stages, ending up in something not so funny. Being iron instead of lets say oxygen, nah, boring. Modern illnesses is stars inside of the cosmos called you dying at rapid rate, forced by our selves, possible to change the outcome, by you.

I am the master of chaos because i can change the sum of entropy, so can all living but in the end we will be, killed by death. Ask how soon you want the reaper to come and play chess.

I tell my friends to forget modern thinking of training, remake it. It would all be better for them if they understand that everything is energy, made up into matter, slowly turning into something more, dead. How do we change and become living again? Accept that most of the things we thought was correct is going out with the dishwater soon. We need to tap into energy once again because we are babies of it. Therefor, this training has to evolve or become living again. We need to become fluid once again, put the basic things in the right place, energy in all of its shapes. When we do, we stop training because we have energies beyond the norms of today. Endurance is the mismatch when we have been loosing the basic currents in our life, power it up and you can be out for hours, living instead. Drop the kettlebell to be strong and chill and let memories power up so you can once again become, human...

I do not train, i live and i intend to do so, even if it means hours (modern unit) in ice cold winters, blistering sun, rain pouring like hell came to earth while the rest pound miles on the tar, pressing keys at the office. I will teach others this, if they are willing, some are. And i give it away for free because there is free lunches in nature.

### prAna303 — 2014-10-18T23:40:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-144213>

Black holes.

Can we think of society and how it builds up to something... Ending?

We often hear that nothing can escape from black holes but can this idea be wrong? Scale it to how modern society is forming and building up to something that some kind of humans want to escape. When matter gets to messy, some particles may collide and from that new matter will form, if the energy level is enough they would become new things that go on and have life with properties of the origin but with different levels of energy, is this the human version we call outlaws, outcast, outsiders and new thinkers?

These black holes is forming in us in rapid pace, is this universal laws going haywire inside of us?

### caroline — 2014-10-19T00:40:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-144221>

love this Peer ..... Thanks. I constantly wonder how and why busy people spend so much time on FB.....

I have opted out to look at the ocean instead ..... infinitely more rewarding .... especially with another human being

I am just on my way to the ocean to meet friends ... most of these people have lived here their whole life - and we are all constantly and continually amazed at the beauty and peace and love and kindness and happiness that flows.

We all just go WOW ..... It never, ever gets old - if anything - it gets more profound and more beautiful and more exciting. It actually overtakes me and overwhelms me and makes me a more conscious and much more happy human being....

something FB and my iphone and ipad has never done ..... for me anyway!

### prAna303 — 2014-11-13T19:33:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-147282>

Age did not do it for me.

That word, age, also a number is one of the greatest error we made up. Since we started to measure the world by a standard that is so static we put ourself, out of time...

As each day and night goes by i feel that perhaps we should describe age as magnetic sense. Last months has been crazy with a seasonal change beyond limits, i feel more out of sync with the modern world than ever but at the same time more connected than ever, why? I think i lost time.

The cold weather is slowly creeping up on me and i get a buzzing feeling, that kind of feeling you had when you where young, on christmas. I do not have to do much, it happens anyway. Can not sit in a bar for long until connection is made, like something odd that they have to poke.

But why age?

We are born like strong magnets, pure and extremely strong. Thru time we slowly loose the powers, then again, we use some fuel to speed it up now. We warm our world so that we have comfort, guess what? Comfort makes us very depleted of magnetism. Deep inside of me i am universe, this soup can boil and freeze, live and die, or change state if you like. With the first snow, falling, changing the world into black and white i feast on small rays of light, i let the cold cook my semiconductors into energy flows and glows...

Play a game, this we did as kids... The magnets where strong and mind fluid. Rules where to be broken and scars healed easy. When we get old, we can not signal to our environment that we are, living.

For so many years i lived out of sync, being both one hundred years old and five. Changing my friends very often, why? I always felt that they faded off, they said i was always doing my stuff. I crave strong magnets. This is why i am so very sold on arts, they live, induce me with ideas and powers...

Again, age.

Changes in a second, going from strong to weak but that is how life is played. The key is not to escape it but to get the magnets inside of you to turn back time.

### Inger — 2014-11-13T19:49:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-147285>

Love it Peter...^^^ you rock
I love that I can see your face

I am addicted to the wild too... like you are. I have a boyfriend now and I am scared of the comfort... it is not what I am looking for... he seems to have hard time to understand
that I love to embrace discomfort
he loves that I am different... that is why he fell in love with me
but he cannot see that I am different --> because of how I live. I think. He thinks I can live like him and stay the same
this is a big challenge for me
and it scares me too. I cannot lose me. No way. That would be like death....... I rather have nothing......... no money.... no comfort... no boyfriend...but staying ALIVE
but i think i can figure it out. Or not.
I choose the wilderness and health ANY time over money and comfort - if I had to choose between those

> I understand that. It is all new to him... he has never seen anything like this before.. he is shocked I love to sleep in a horse barn  but I do. I LOVE it there.
> I will make no compromises when it comes to my health and well being. Other stuff, I do not care

That is why i always have a taste for strong women...

What scares the others makes me drawn to them like a kid to sugar. They can have insane powers, being an athlete. They can play instruments that makes me chill. They can look at others and showing nothing to them but for me i get "jumped"...

### NeilBB — 2014-11-13T20:27:31+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-147295>

> [prAna303 said:](/goto/post?id=147282)
>
> Age did not do it for me.
>
> That word, age, also a number is one of the greatest error we made up. Since we started to measure the world by a standard that is so static we put ourself, out of time...
>
> As each day and night goes by i feel that perhaps we should describe age as magnetic sense. Last months has been crazy with a seasonal change beyond limits, i feel more out of sync with the modern world than ever but at the same time more connected than ever, why? I think i lost time.
>
> The cold weather is slowly creeping up on me and i get a buzzing feeling, that kind of feeling you had when you where young, on christmas. I do not have to do much, it happens anyway. Can not sit in a bar for long until connection is made, like something odd that they have to poke.
>
> But why age?
>
> We are born like strong magnets, pure and extremely strong. Thru time we slowly loose the powers, then again, we use some fuel to speed it up now. We warm our world so that we have comfort, guess what? Comfort makes us very depleted of magnetism. Deep inside of me i am universe, this soup can boil and freeze, live and die, or change state if you like. With the first snow, falling, changing the world into black and white i feast on small rays of light, i let the cold cook my semiconductors into energy flows and glows...
>
> Play a game, this we did as kids... The magnets where strong and mind fluid. Rules where to be broken and scars healed easy. When we get old, we can not signal to our environment that we are, living.
>
> For so many years i lived out of sync, being both one hundred years old and five. Changing my friends very often, why? I always felt that they faded off, they said i was always doing my stuff. I crave strong magnets. This is why i am so very sold on arts, they live, induce me with ideas and powers...
>
> Again, age.
>
> Changes in a second, going from strong to weak but that is how life is played. The key is not to escape it but to get the magnets inside of you to turn back time.

I think age should be measured, not in time, but strictly in terms of level of accumulated cellular damage.

### prAna303 — 2014-11-13T20:37:00+0200

I use this formula:

Hate, if i do not hate many things, i can not love. If i feel that this sense is going down, accepting to much events in my life, changes must be done. Age for me is connected with a state where everything is, soft and mellow, warm and comfy, you know somekind of acceptance that this is how it should be.

To load up on hate, i see things i want to change...

Can i say that i hate myself from time to time?

### prAna303 — 2014-11-17T13:33:36+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-147606>

We protect ourselves against what feeds us and open the doors to thieves.

Winter knocking on the door with promises of cold and dark, white and black. Bulking up on the right gear to maintain order, hats, mitts and warm soups. Soon the magic should appear in form of a guy in red giving us joy and health.

Do we put to much trust in things outside of us?

I like to use somekind of reversal in my thinking. This would perhaps explain why i did my digital math once upon time with ease, negative can be positive. Instead of wearing clothes in nature, i use clothes inside to protect me. Have never used sunglasses outside but when i did weld before, i did...

"light changes matter no matter what"

All kind of light make difference to subjects that are in the way of it. If you are living, depending on the definition of life it makes you switch from day and night, living and dead... One issue remains, are you just crossing over to the side of, not so living you start a real breakdown. Matter changes because energy states switch all the time.

We walk thru the summers, slowly getting a tan, changing the system to maintain that balance of light. We protect ourselves with this change, going thru seasons. Winter comes and we turn pale and almost blue, can that be a clue?

Together we bind our units with positive and negative, everything transfers in a natural world. When a current of flow exist, what else shows up to the performance? Here we get a binding glue to make memories work. The sun gives information, just like any other vibration, we encode this with our brains, starting and stopping systems.

Clues are everywhere for the one who is in passion with... Life.

Many shake heads, point fingers, gives us warning when we do what the normal person call "extreme sports". Most often these kind of activity happens, guess where? Nature and natural elements. How can a human climb walls steep and impossible without any protection? How can a human dive 100 meters on a single breath of air? How can a human move slowly and steadily over long range? Is is in our code, yours and mine. These things we do are not super human or crazy, it is inside of each and everyone. How do we tap into that?

When we stop using modern lifestyle as laws, stop listening to people defending a thought that is in error. We need to open the shell we put ourselves into, change your idea in an instant, to hell with science of now. Make your own!

I call my friends extreme, working 9 to 5, watching movies on iPads, nursing kids with technology even if they can not wipe their own behind and age of seven. I call them extreme because they, not me, live in a dreamkind of state. I call it an illusion to protect myself from nature, i must have cold, wet, dirty, warm, sunny and sexy. Anything else is not worth it...

Do i have a plan for times to come? No... I can not make plans, i can not predict, i can only respond and each time i must do, repeat do and do again. Memories tells me to be smart but still i force myself into situations that i would avoid, why i ask myself?

Life is acting on the stage, new and old people come and go. What i did with others do not apply to my world right here and now. Just because i loved yesterday does not mean it should make today pale, objects to love changes but the sense remains. It applies to hate, pain, pleasure, yes... Everything.

​

our kids do not know how to use touch pad and they do not know the heroes from the kids animated series. We switch on tv just once a week and we usually put on some disney classic or more recent pixar movie. They wear no caps, raincoats and often play barefoot round the year. in the summer they walk half naked in the town and naked in the country side. My 5 year old girl walked in wind, mild rain and difficult terrain 25 km without snacks this Saturday. I have been threaten many times by unknown people they would call the social service because I do not take good care of my kids. I am the crazy one! I wish you lived nearer so we could have a walk and talk occasionally ;-)

### caroline — 2014-11-19T12:36:26+0200

### prAna303 — 2014-11-19T13:40:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-147812>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=147807)
>
> Peter ....I am not sure that this is really you.....
>
> I like the picture in my head .....
>
> My instinct tells me that this is not you .. not the real you.....

Okey... Now let me tell you a story.

From day one here, i talked about how we see the world, why?

In a very short period of time we have gone from being creatures of energy to being back-up to our smartphones but how do that relate to above?

I come from a very different perspecitve of health, never had any kind of illness, always having senses that were very sensitive, gulping down arts and sublime things even thru my harsh periods. Early on, here, i said that i hated pictures.

Now you sense that very same conflict that i sense every single second of life. When i look at pictures, photos mostly, they do not make me feel at all, why? They are noting else than a illusion on how we with simple things try to describe what we see. Photos are a mismatch, mostly because we went digital, we lost magic.

To really tap into a human we can only do it with flesh naked, brains blown up and not avoiding anything.

You see, this picture is me but in a very sampled form and why is this wrong to "feel" others? It is static and none of us is that even if most wish that some moments where. This is why clinging on to pictures, memories only steals us away from the never ending changing reality...

I put up my picture because of one thing... It is a "hack". Would response from others change when you get a locked image onto a flowing mind. Result, yes! What will soon be reported here.

Also, early on i said that i hate pictures of me because they show something that i can not relate to, also they can never give a real reaction in others. When you look at pictures you have with modern eyes felt, good or bad looking. You made up if you would like to stick to that illusion instead of exploring that person in pure flesh.

And now you sense that this is not me. Most would be insulted, i salute you for sensing that we are more than illusions. This tells me that you are working in other dimensions than others, sublime levels. Why?

What i told you all in this thread gives us a picture of the writer, the artist. Together with that you have a movie going on when you read but the actor is not me, it is you. This is the arts my friends.

Adding on to this, i said that many do not get attracted to me with vision only, i must be felt as a whole. My magnetic sense is far stronger than most others so therefor i draw living humans to me all the time.

To all of you my friends, it is time to step it up! Kickstart the show that you play the leadrole in, life.

### prAna303 — 2014-11-19T13:58:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-147814>

Creator versus users.

Have you become a user lately?

All around the world we live in, things tend to go towards... Parody!

We sit back, forcefeed ourselves with media, forcefeed ourselves with foods, forcefeed ourselves with systems and laws but do we create. What is a driving force in the act of creating? Hate...

I hate so very much because i must always change things. Nothing can remain the same even if i try, it is a universal law that demands more than cottonballs. Most of us get told that this is how it should be, this is how that should look and with all our means we follow that trend.

Today i know why i can not stand to be in a business model anymore, you read it, model. Nothing can work with that mentality that most seek, comfort and wealth. Systems builds and take over the ideas, we cling on to the like rats on titanic, instead jump and see what happens.

Now i see why people are drawn to me, it is not about being a good member of society, it is a game of energy. Nothing stands still, nothing will survive in static laws, only the law itself.

In this systematic, user friendly world we build more and more are getting a touch of illness. We become what shines light upon our matter. Blue tinted lightsettings makes you look sick when you have natural setup on your side. Listen to those small signals that is being sent to you. Only you can read it according to your own status.

I am leaving the digital, forum world more and more because i build a new understanding where i am, local. Global makes us loose the connections that really feeds us, it is only when you overflow you can handle global in a good manor i think...

Off to the woods.

### prAna303 — 2014-11-19T15:29:15+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-147820>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=147807)
>
> Peter ....I am not sure that this is really you.....
>
> I like the picture in my head .....
>
> My instinct tells me that this is not you .. not the real you.....

These words do mean more than you probably think they do.

They nail perhaps one of the biggest questions modern human faces today.

Pictures were once a copy of a dear moment in life, photos captured some small particles that were present, right there. We used chemicals to glue some details, something to take home and remember. It do not take much for someone who has lived a situation to go back to that feeling, a smell, a sound and yes a picture. We add on to that information what we have in our whole body, it is not a mind thing. You can get a sense of horror from a smell, the list goes on.

We went digital, ones and zeros. Making still pictures, photos but slowly we stopped catching those small particles. Memories not the same...

Today, we have pictures and photos before the event. We dream and make illusions of what to come and be, can i say mismatch?

Artists do act with their whole system, they can do magical things, describing the world so that you have a sense of what to make of it. The same should be with learning, that we are loosing today. To explain to someone what a cat is, is like music and art to me, you build something inside your student so when they see and touch it live can get a whole. Now we learn thru dumb pictures on iPads. Teaching how something should appear to be, a photo of something. But...

How do we make it real? Someone who learned about cats on iPads, meaning of it from wiki, seen thru google can not relate to a living cat. They attack them, and yes i do see it everyday. Kids and parents think they educate their loved ones but when the reality comes to play, your teaching is flaw.

Photos were once meant in my world to reflect a present so that i can fill in with future to make now. This is why we gets constant mismatch, we must have it live first and then we can use it to wake memories up.

Reminds me very much about what we used to call "original" or outcasts in Sweden.

The thing is, my escape is something very different... I belive we can have a richer life by taking some steps back and take and make new paths. As i like the feeling in those pictures, a connection to them i also sense a great sadness.

What i feel is, like in one post earlier today, the also are users. I want to be a creator, i want people around me to get a dynamic group, a place where everyone plays their own role in the show called life.

Even if there is some very welcoming feeling in that way of living i can only feel that, what would i do if it was this nice and mellow? I think my life would slowly fade away...

I must have all my senses filled, like that i could not get performing arts, no nightclub, no difference between good or bad.

The irony is that escape is like finding comfort, exactly what i hate in the modern world. I must do my acting every day.

I still sleep in the woods from time to time and then travel into society to be human. The mix makes me go Yum.

Just the other day, at my coffee fix, a girl came up to me and said hi. She was new in town but been here for a while, that day she just had to do the most scary thing she ever done, according to her, to face and contact me. From the first day she saw me there she thought about who i am and why, why she gets angry, hating me, she wanted to smash my face...

Yes these were her words so we talked and ended up, lets just say more connected than most ever would be today.

> You are probably one of the few people I don't want to meet in person

I seem to light up that feeling in humans...

### prAna303 — 2014-11-25T09:50:19+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-148408>

It is what it is.

We all chase some demons, most search for a better status in their life but if the search string is wrong?

We tend to see only the better things, the bad ones we must leave behind but how do we search. One thing i feel is wrong in society today and perhaps its greatest problem, we use systems and guidelines.

Read somewhere in a thread that: perhaps humans are lazy and that is a natural tool, well this is what i could read between the lines.

When you start to act like that, we are lazy, you buy everything that others teach. Words are such a weak method to learn and teach and these are golden today, much helped with internet. I belive learning is only made by doing because static rules can never apply to living things. This is why many see some good effects when trying to change but then another mismatch appears and you blame the system. Countless different areas gets covered by that in society today.

Take on the "lazy" road you must go back in time, to the age of non society. This is not today, lazy means accepting things for what they seems to be, not what they are.

Why is this a never ending change game? One must understand that rest is not something we should do, even sleep is hard work. But what i think is that we must always be our own change agent, our own secret agent, spy who looks upon ourselves all the time. When good appears at your door, the deal is changing but must be put to test again. We can not adapt a system that someone else said, it will work. You must gather so much details that you can sense what this really is and make a choice once again.

Chess can be life. Good or bad, you must brake yourself into pieces with every move. You make some bad moves and you change the game, good ones get the same stress test. You can not be lazy, you must create with the whole you.

I do not accept my feelings as a guide.

When i feel good, i break that pattern.
When i feel bad, i break that pattern.
When i feel sad, i break that pattern.
When i feel happy, i break that pattern.

But most i break my pattern when i get success. This state is like poison to me, what is the meaning when i do not have to fight to always change?

Masochistic someone said about getting cold, yes i am perhaps masochistic in all parts of life. I think that you must always look and change, not just adapt because that is quite lazy. Energy changes all the time and i must use the same method otherwise i take on a road that is static. When i wake up, i break my patterns as often as possible, nature changes from day to day and i must play along.

Nature is the board of my chess game but i am not just a single actor, i do them all at the same time, even my opponents.

### prAna303 — 2015-04-04T20:09:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-160314>

To break, not be broken.

Is it possible to change things that others say, live with it?

Since i spend many hours on my passion for movement and motion i thought, what if?

Others say, why brake a system that works. Others say that common sense is good. Others say, listen to the pros...

This wonderful winter i took on a mission, the mission to unwind my own body.

Not because i feel pains or having trouble but because i wanted to enter a world that should be closed for one in my age. I needed to become able to not see my body with limits. Doctors have said that i have damage beyond repair, four hits by cars, a shoulder that is badly twisted twentyfive years ago, many other physical damage done on this poor body.

I collected all words by Jack and others, blended it with science from different aspects, spicing it up with torture from dance and circus, opened the door to nature and how it demands things. Simply, letting go of myself so i no longer stood in the way of my own potential. Have i reached heavens? Almost, details can always be added but the game goes on.

So, can we do magical things, even when others say... Adapt!

Yes, with every aspect of life. It is not about the foods, it is mainly about what we do, where we place ourselves and also, give yourself a break, even if it means you can not move tomorrow. When nature is your guide, very little can go wrong. It is when you follow systems that is failing we think we are on the path. I think we must go back to a way of masters that can share times with us, not systems that applies to many. We must ask, why do this mean good for everyone when they always complain?

All i can say, we can reverse illness, we can reverse bad habits, we can go back in time to the point where it all went downhill and change path, do not let anyone kill your passion, just point it where you need it, not others.

### JoeBranca — 2015-04-08T21:26:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-160667>

a thought I wasn't sure where to put down, maybe this is the thread.

I worry that we have been experiencing an extinction event of the long form. I don't mean a sustained thought for a particular duration.

I mean the unbroken slates and blackboards on which cultures have not only collected and projected their narratives, but also experimented. Within the narratives and experimental concepts of the long form, there is pregnant space for a process of evolution that, in some hook or another, helps us evolve by the very act of observing or listening.

But now, most of what draws the eye and ear comes in fragmented packages, right? It's not just the short duration itself that's the problem, or the proliferation of media competing for attention and hits, it's the absence or perceived irrelevance of a pregnant space for visions writ large, the kinds that convey some vital evolution by which we can enlarge our own lives. If the newer media outlets assume their stories and deliverables are constantly interruptible and can also framed by non sequiter product without complaint, I think by definition that sort of evolution cannot happen. We are not expected to be transformed in any meaningful way. Challenging, entertaining, clever, suspenseful, all this for sure. But that ain't the same. I often wondered why no single Tee Vee show can compare for example to Herzog and his low budget camera crew taking me deep into the Amazon, in all of its existential confrontational imagery.

Vital film, performance, and art are still holdouts, but the cognitive shift in the social mediaholic public marches on. So who can withstand the tide?

### prAna303 — 2015-04-18T20:45:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-161664>

Analog vs digital.

We could use other words but just because words have such low bandwith, i choose them like that.

I have reached a fine line, a line that do point out some very clear things and reasons.

I grew up with a quite analog world, slowly digital was welcomed, i did open the door.

I had deep passions for some quite exquisite things, others thought it was quite nuts. I did fall in love with photography, the whole thing. Capture something that was not a copy of the world but also an abstract picture, i had to dream. When cameras became digital i stopped, gave up, magic was not there, back then did i little know why.

I was crazy in love with music, listening for many hours daily... On high end system only, to get a room, a state where the needle enhanced that information back in my room, for me to build a soundscape. Digital came and i stopped, CD´s sounded and pictured some very pale vision, i hated the room gone away. Oh, back then did i little know why.

Notice, that the word "i" is common, it all starts with yourself.

I did have a deep passion for work, making money, transfer money, burn money... Boy it was good days. Digital world came and i had a fling with her again, did she make me click? Not for very long. Now everything, almost is digital. Everyone makes ones and zeros their day.

Ten years ago i filed for divorce. Tough times but we came to a solution. I promised to never go back and become so blindly in love with her again. I quit doing time in the digital sphere, now i only hang around this place.

I really do hate the world we are making today, i promised myself that i will be a change. I started to help people with some issues and that has also come to a point now, every time i do these things i get so sad. What have we become? At the same time i feel hope, if i could do it, so can others.

Three years ago i turned off the clocks, those things that did make me feel small, went into my closet and dragged some stuff out, guess who it was? Analog, she had been waiting there for so many years, sure... Dusty, in bad shape but willing and able. Like a fine blanket of wool from Scotland sheep we started to change my own world.

Now i am doing what i never thought i would be able to do, acting. Making something that is growing like a small child. I walk the streets with my chin high, looking deeply at people, breaking their comfort. I heard last night that i scare people, i am to honest and read their story without them telling me with words. I am never going to stand back, even if i really never did before but now i turned up the volume, my soundsystem is playing it out loud.

Analog is taking over the ones with taste for life, digital is for those who wants a fix for the moment. Analog demands your love and passion, when you give that she gives you magic, the world expands, you expands. Why do you think that the biggest companies in the movie business have sign up with Kodak, for them to still make film to filmmakers for many more years?

Wicked and weird, i say, only way to go now. Be a rockstar, yes you can. Be a superhuman with extreme powers, yes you can. Why? In a world with simulations, for us who dare, being analog frankenstein will make you shine.

### prAna303 — 2015-04-29T21:25:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-162784>

School of outlaws.

I think that the mantra of our time must go out with the garbage, the rhyme that does not even give any sweet music.

Stability, oh... Word of great leaders, parents, doctors and yes everyone. We have been nuked with the idea that we shall maintain a stable world. Economy should be stable so that we can find secure and stable income from stable and fixed work. We have been told that you should have a stable heartrate, stable numbers on a paper to proof your health. We build a stable world around us, house on stable ground, we as humans must get help to maintain a stability thru shoes and insoles. We even think that summer should follow rules, otherwise we could not plan our holidays with precision.

I say, to hell with stability.

We crave that ever changing world, we belong in earthquakes, internal and external. Sun makes ripples inside of us, moon makes us crazy in a good way. My feet, my body does not need squared gears, it needs to belong in a natural state, world. My economy must go up and down, longing for crisis and good times. Why is it that humans tend to have affairs when stability has gotten us into its ugly grip?

Stability makes us dull and boring, also sick and ill. When we make rules based upon that mantra we also kill many chances. What makes us change? When we accept that unstable is good we tend to act upon our senses once again. You must always do the acting and change, otherwise you either end up fixed and locked, or falling down from that line in the air.

Bring me back to that word, outlaw (thanks Tom Robbins). I think we must go on that path now, the world is not getting a touch of spring butterflies anymore, fresh moss in april sun is not sexy for most. Sun is avoided, once we praised it now hated by many. Still we allow that smartphone to send waves that starts systems in us but without getting the right information, is this why we love technology more that nature now?

Jack and others are showing many small clues, do we act upon them?

For me, this place is the university of wicked and weird, also something that must be spread in the... yes, real world. What can i do, you might ask?

Go out, be a real human that listen to real music, buy the artist some wine and connect. Why like something on Facebook when you might get laid by a rockstar or that wonderful female version, vixen. Yes, show others that you like them, support them and make them real once again. The world of medicine and society is slowly killing your potential likens.

### prAna303 — 2015-06-06T16:43:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-166809>

She had long legs and strong fingers.

When the needle goes into the groove it picks up many small details. Transfering it to my amplifier so my speakers can turn in out loud. I get under attack from those vibrations, not just with my ears but with my whole if i allow it. If my sound system is of better quality it do not distort the signals that much and sometimes even add on to it, what happens next is magic.

Inside of me i slowly start to create a room, a place from which the recording has captured time and history. It gets bigger and bigger depending on my own status, my own ability to accept those signals. Every small fragment contains so many parts of information that goes into my own unit without any timelag, almost. With this i respond by making a picture, almost like a movie.

Is this what light does to us also? Is sound just light? Both are waves and from lightwaves we can make holograms. Every single piece contains the whole picture if we shine the right light at it.

You and me sends small signals of light, we take them in and create a vision of what others are and also what i am. Can it be that these images makes our actions? Sometimes it resonates and other times we get distorted.

How could a living thing use the light of modern technology? If you are created from natural kind then how should you be able to create a world with the new one? Since we can restore with this light we also destroy with the new kind... The weird thing is that so many can not see the difference today.

If i watch a clip on internet, lets say a scene of climbing or freediving something happens inside of me. Since i live that i way i get turned on, getting an itch to go, do and be. When i see a cat on a skateboard i feel sick. The images i can build inside of me is based on real light and the faked one is just fake, but it can wake the other. The reaction would be to feel inspired to explore universe not get stucked inside, googling pictures and playing with napalm on Facebook.

And in the end, just some rambling of a mind shocked by the usage of smartphones.

### prAna303 — 2015-06-13T21:45:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-167990>

> [JoeBranca said:](/goto/post?id=160667)
>
> a thought I wasn't sure where to put down, maybe this is the thread.
>
> I worry that we have been experiencing an extinction event of the long form. I don't mean a sustained thought for a particular duration.
>
> I mean the unbroken slates and blackboards on which cultures have not only collected and projected their narratives, but also experimented. Within the narratives and experimental concepts of the long form, there is pregnant space for a process of evolution that, in some hook or another, helps us evolve by the very act of observing or listening.
>
> But now, most of what draws the eye and ear comes in fragmented packages, right? It's not just the short duration itself that's the problem, or the proliferation of media competing for attention and hits, it's the absence or perceived irrelevance of a pregnant space for visions writ large, the kinds that convey some vital evolution by which we can enlarge our own lives. If the newer media outlets assume their stories and deliverables are constantly interruptible and can also framed by non sequiter product without complaint, I think by definition that sort of evolution cannot happen. We are not expected to be transformed in any meaningful way. Challenging, entertaining, clever, suspenseful, all this for sure. But that ain't the same. I often wondered why no single Tee Vee show can compare for example to Herzog and his low budget camera crew taking me deep into the Amazon, in all of its existential confrontational imagery.
>
> Vital film, performance, and art are still holdouts, but the cognitive shift in the social mediaholic public marches on. So who can withstand the tide?

Live from Sweden.

A nice afternoon talk with and old and dear friend. He was my hero as a little kid and still we have a special bound, once again quantum physics is proven... Ever since i was, nine i guess, he was dating my older sister and in a wicked way, us two were the ones who found each other. Running on different tracks and each time we meet we share the same feelings and have done changes at very much the same time.

He has a couple of kids and this guy is really an artist... He paints like a god, plays guitar on feelings and pretty much everything he does, he do it with his whole unit and system. The sad part is that according to the system of society in Sweden now, the kids are not okey. They have issues with learning, reading and accepting the system. When they are allowed to do what they feel is right they are corrected. On the other hand and in this country today they are true artists.

One who have problems with math do paint like a queen, sing like angels but what is that worth now?

The other can listen to a tune and instantly play it on his guitar, he looks like a hippie and what can he provide to society?

Each day i see systems fail, school is killing kids, the list is long.

The thing is that, i can not hold back any longer. I see so much potential in humans but they are given strict restrictions, do this and that and not this. Changes has been done to my own "work", focusing on what is possible and how to open more doors instead of limiting choices. So many weird things has happened thru the last month that give proof of concept to my own lifestyle and the science this place gives us...

On some parts we should perhaps switch back to leonardo da vinci time and take a new path. I must go out more and do more, meet more people and let them expand. Not in a goofy kind of way but in a new old fashioned one.

### prAna303 — 2015-06-23T16:36:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-new-old-fashioned.6069/post-169386>

Distortion.

Do every single cell play out the whole?

They come and go but not that often do we grow a foot instead of a nose. If this small part can contain the image of the whole then we perhaps have a image after all. To make the hologram show up, the right light plays a great role, is it the same with us? Once this little friend should be primed with natural light to be used by your unit at the right time and place, we could disturb it. Do this distort the picture within us? The cell goes to work on a frame that is wrong in picture compared to living unit.

Heard that the normal person today use about eight to ten hours each day to explore the digital realm. How many distorted lightbeams do this person see, how do your systems respond with all of these sparks? With health, i doubt.

When the light hits us, eyes, skin, touch, hearing, yes every single sense. The energy is everywhere until the path where it is mostly needed is choosen, perhaps i guess, who knows? If you get a light that says, die to some parts of you, will they? Do they have that ability when the image is distorted.

Last weekend i saw something different, frame versus reality. Inside this person i saw a potential and when she moved the story was different, so broken and stressed to failure. Treatment from age of seven to build a perfect foot, perfect by the books. Nobody even cared about how her inner picture was, can they not see it? Instead of locking her up, i found ways to give the person the image i saw.

Most of us, us modern high tech humans have this distortion, a body that do not resonate with how the parts think you should look and be. I think we have code for much greater things than this, why do we limit our limbs by example.

Timing, so from above situation. Timing and sync where not to be found. Ticks and very disturbed motion was there but gone after ten minutes, can not put this to words really but we can change in a blink of an eye.

It is quite easy i think...

First of all, find nature that provides a natural loneliness without other humans. Up north, here in Sweden it is really simple, i walk offroad for a couple of minutes to be free.

Second, do it. We build so many obstacles about such a natural thing. Start with a tent, go to tarp and end up under naked skies. I do prefer wintertime, best from -2C i think. There is something very special in the connection, sleep and real cold.

This country is made for these things...

### b612 — 2015-06-26T14:24:20+0300
